title: Make Our Summer Place Your Summer Place
contentHtml:
Prospective and new families are invited to tour camp this spring and summer! Our team is excited to meet you, tell you about camp, share details on our amazing 540 acre campus, and answer your questions. Limited spots available and RSVPs are required.

Don’t miss your chance to get an inside look at why we were selected as one of America’s Best Summer Camps by Newsweek!

RSVP for a Spring Tour RSVP for a Summer Tour

Note: Summer Tours are open to families who do not have children at CBM during Summer 2025 at the time of the tour.

Can’t make it? Take a virtual tour.

Contact Us | Tips for First-time Families | Enroll Now!
